tables.name: parcels
tables.label: Parcels
tables.description: City lots placed on a real map. Tap one to zone it (residential, commercial, industrial, park).

tables.name: city
tables.label: City
tables.description: The city's running state — turn, budget, population, happiness, pollution.

tables.name: city_history
tables.label: History
tables.description: A snapshot of the city's stats at the end of each turn (for the trend charts).

tables.name: features
tables.label: Features
tables.description: Real OpenStreetMap points around the city — green spaces/parks and roads — used as the spatial backdrop for the per-resident simulation.

tables.name: residents
tables.label: Residents
tables.description: Individual residents placed on the map. Each has its own nature/car preferences; happiness is recomputed from nearby features and parcels.
